desc: Liz co-founded the W.P. Carey self-storage platform and led the acquisition of over 120 self-storage properties totaling ~$1B while there, building the 8th largest self-storage portfolio in the U.S. as of 2016.
Liz founded Merit Hill Capital.
Large institutional investor made $300M capital commitment to Merit Hill’s first value-add vehicle.
Acquired 32 self-storage properties for $136.7M.
Acquired 36 self-storage properties for $224.6M and sold 4 properties for strong returns well ahead of schedule.
Acquired 62 self-storage properties for $368.2M and sold 12 properties for strong returns well ahead of schedule.
Institutional investor made an additional $200M capital commitment to Merit Hill’s second value-add vehicle.
Acquired 57 self-storage properties for $374.2M, including an off-market 26-property portfolio for $178.9M.
Sold 31 properties for strong returns well ahead of schedule.
Acquired 126 self-storage properties for $1.08B and sold 41 properties for strong returns well ahead of schedule.
Acquired an off-market 59 property portfolio for $635.5M as part of a joint venture with an institutional investor and a sovereign wealth fund.

Institutional investor made an additional $180M commitment to Merit Hill’s fourth value-add vehicle while Merit Hill began fundraising for Merit Hill Self-Storage, LP which together entered into a joint venture to form Fund IV.
Launched Merit Hill’s first core-plus fund, Merit Hill Self-Storage Core Plus Fund, LP.
Acquired 62 self-storage properties for $474.1M and sold 1 property.
Closed fundraising for Fund IV with total commitments above the fund’s $100M target size from a diversified investor base.
Acquired 63 self-storage properties for $328.5M and sold 3 properties.
Began fundraising for Merit Hill Self-Storage V, LP (“Fund V”).
Acquired 52 self-storage properties for $269.7M.
Closed fundraising for Fund V with total commitments of $500M, above the Fund’s target size.
Began fundraising for Merit Hill Self-Storage VI, LP (“Fund VI”).
Acquired 66 self-storage properties for $525.7M and sold 62 properties.
Closed fundraising for Fund VI with total commitments of $578.3M, above the Fund’s target size.
